items.name: Striped Shirt & Striped Silk Repp Narrow Tie
items.description: Woven with cotton for an oversize silhouette, this shirt features a yarn-dyed striped motif and is detailed with our signature embroidered Pony at the cuff. Exceptional fabrics, signature designs, and fine Italian craftsmanship are the hallmarks of our woven ties. Each one is hand-cut on a perfect 45-degree bias to ensure that it never twists or turns. This version's silk repp cloth was custom-developed with a centuries-old English mill.

items.name: Glamorous  2000s Beige Striped Button-Up Blouse
items.description:
nymphes ugc ♡
thank you so much for purchasing if you did!! <3

join the group for more cute accessories:
https://www.roblox.com/communities/761122618/LoveGhouls#!/about

Dripping in 2000s luxury, the Gold 2000s Luxury McBling Gyaru Necklace Knuckle is the ultimate trendsetter piece. Imagine stepping out of a pink leopard-print limo, paparazzi flashes bouncing off your vintage glam statement necklace. The bold brass knuckle charm exudes attitude, while the shimmering diamond and twinkling star catch the light, radiating pure McBling energy. Channeling the fierce, over-the-top aesthetic of Y2K icons, this piece is made for those who dare to sparkle, shine, and rule the scene with unapologetic glamour.
